executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Output language: Playwright TypeScript files. Group tests by flow (one .spec.ts per flow: auth, students-list, student-detail, onboarding-render, programs-tab, messages, edge-cases). Test titles can be Turkish (e.g. "Doğru credential ile login başarılı"). Use credentials elif.demir@fithub.demo / FitHub2026Demo! as the primary coach (Buse'nin koçu) and kaan.yildiz@fithub.demo / FitHub2026Demo! as secondary (Deniz'in koçu). Existing students in DB: buse.celik@fithub.demo (Mon/Wed/Fri/Sat — 4 days), deniz.korkmaz@fithub.demo. The generated suite should accept process.env.BASE_URL (default http://localhost:5173) so the same code can run against https://fithub-admin-nwtg.onrender.com production. AI workout generation can take 10-60s; use 120s timeout for that flow. Skip mobile responsive, multi-language, image upload tests. Strict assertions: Genel Bakış must NOT contain "Diz ağrısı" or "Supplement"; StudentDetail tabs must be exactly ["Genel Bakış","Programlar","Öğün Fotoğrafları","Form Analizi"] with no "Mesajlar" tab; Messages page must NOT show "Çevrimiçi" or "Çevrimdışı" text.
